description_long: This is a large, square stone plant pot with ornate floral relief carvings on each face, set atop a thick, rectangular base. The pot features a deep, open cavity suitable for holding soil and plants, with the interior rim visible from above. Each side is adorned with a detailed basket of flowers motif, giving the pot a classical and decorative appearance. The stone surface shows subtle weathering and discoloration, suggesting it is intended for outdoor use. The pot's substantial size and weight make it a prominent fixture, likely to be found in public or formal urban spaces such as parks or plazas. The craftsmanship and material indicate durability and a design meant to complement traditional or historic architectural settings.
description: A large, square stone plant pot with ornate floral reliefs on each side, set on a thick base and designed for outdoor decorative use.
description_view_0: Front view showing a detailed floral basket relief centered on a clean, slightly weathered stone face.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar floral motif, but with more visible discoloration and subtle surface stains.
description_view_2: Another side view, highlighting the depth of the pot's cavity and the intricate relief work.
description_view_3: Rear view with the same floral basket motif, showing the pot's symmetrical design and consistent ornamentation.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative planter in public gardens, plazas, or near building entrances
